calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF JORGE VALDEZ , AN INDIVIDUAL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The Motion to compel/Denied. 1.First, the Court notes Plaintiff's counsel did not respond to the issue of timeliness. 2. Defense counsel is correct . Motion is in violation of CCP Sec. 2030.300.
Plaintiff had 45 days from September 13 to file motion. that date was October 28 not the 30th as argued by defendant. Regardless the motion was 8 days late. 3.See Sexton v. Superior Court (1997) 58 Cal.App.4th 1403, 1410 [court lacks authority to rule on an untimely motion]; Vidal Sassoon, Inc. v. Superior Court (1983) 147 Cal.App.3d 681, 685 [time limitations to bring a motion to compel are mandatory].

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/BZ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Continued To Mar-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

PLAINTIFF JORGE VALDEZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One

PLAINTIFF JORGE VALDEZ , AN INDIVIDUAL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

The matter is continued to February 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302 for the parties to provide courtesy copies as required by local rules. Defendant shall provide courtesy copies of the Opposition to Dept. 302 by February 12, 2025 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Plaintiff shall provide courtesy copies of the Reply to Dept. 302 by February 12, 2025 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
